nodes.label: A2ARouter Class
nodes.rationale: Placeholder for production A2A protocol; uses Map for O(1) handler lookup by AgentName; returns error A2AMessage when no handler registered for the target agent

nodes.label: AdkAgentAdapter Interface
nodes.rationale: Adapter pattern placeholder for Google ADK interoperability; converts between platform-native AgentInput/AgentOutput and ADK-specific AdkRequest/AdkResponse formats

nodes.label: ArchitectureAgent Class
nodes.rationale: Uses 'planning' LLM profile via ModelGateway for ADR and architecture decision generation; constructs SystemMessage+HumanMessage prompts; returns GATEWAY_ERROR with retryable:false on failure

nodes.label: BaseAgent Interface
nodes.rationale: Temporal owns workflow sequencing; agents own reasoning and tool use. Decouples graph construction (createGraph) from execution (invoke)

nodes.label: CompiledGraph Interface
nodes.rationale: Structural type matching LangGraph CompiledStateGraph to allow varied state shapes without a concrete generic dependency

nodes.label: bindTools Function
nodes.rationale: Parses 'provider/tool' name format for MCP registry; defaults to 'unknown' provider for unprefixed tool names

nodes.label: ScopePolicy (Agent Safety Boundary - forbidden pattern guard)
ModelResponse (unified LLM response: content + toolCalls + usage + metadata)
Rationale: TokenUsage is defined locally in shared/types to avoid circular dependency with model-gateway
Rationale: Agents request LLM capabilities by profile name, not by provider/model, decoupling agent logic from provider choice
Rationale: agent.ts + task.ts + workflow.ts together form the cross-layer data contract consumed by API, workers, and frontend
Rationale: AgentError.retryable flag enables automatic retry decisions at the workflow orchestration layer without agent-specific logic

hyperedges.label: Agent Triad: ModelGateway Injection + Invoke Pattern
createModelGateway assembles all providers and config into the gateway
Core Domain Contract Types — agent + task + workflow used across all platform layers
Zod Schema Validation Layer — runtime validation mirror of type contracts
Model Gateway Architecture — service + registry + profiles + adapters + catalog
Agent-Gateway Bridge — AgentConfig drives profile selection; AgentError surfaces gateway failures; TokenUsage mirrors gateway usage
